Season switcher.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Season switcher.description: Allows you to trigger seasonal events at will, for a price.

Starspawn.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Starsnow.Name: Starsnow
Starsnow.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Starsnow.description: Christmas cookies drop 5% more often. Reindeer appear 5% more often.

Starterror.Name: Starterror

Starlove.Name: Starlove
Starlove.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Starlove.description: Heart cookies are 50% more powerful. Golden cookies appear 2% more often during Valentines.

Angels.Name: Angels
Angels.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Twin Gates of Transcendence.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Twin Gates of Transcendence.description: (70) You now keep making cookies while the game is closed, at the rate of 5% of your regular CpS and up to 1 hour after the game is closed.

Chimera.Name: Chimera
Chimera.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Tin of butter cookies.Name: Tin of butter cookies
Tin of butter cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Tin of butter cookies.description: Contains an assortment of rich butter cookies. Complete with little paper cups."

Golden switch.Name: Golden switch
Golden switch.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Golden switch.description: Unlocks the golden switch, which passively boosts your CpS by 50% but disables golden cookies.

Classic dairy selection.Name: Classic dairy selection
Classic dairy selection.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Classic dairy selection.description: Unlocks the milk selector, letting you pick which milk is displayed under your cookie. Comes with a variety of basic flavors.

Fanciful dairy selection.Name: Fanciful dairy selection
Fanciful dairy selection.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Fanciful dairy selection.description: Contains more exotic flavors for your milk selector.

Belphegor.Name: Belphegor
Belphegor.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Belphegor.description: (71) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 2 hours.

Mammon.Name: Mammon
Mammon.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Mammon.description: (72) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 4 hours.

Abaddon.Name: Abaddon
Abaddon.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Abaddon.description: (73) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 8 hours.

Satan.Name: Satan
Satan.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Satan.description: (74) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 16 hours.

Asmodeus.Name: Asmodeus
Asmodeus.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Asmodeus.description: (75) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 1 day and 8 hours.

Beelzebub.Name: Beelzebub
Beelzebub.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Beelzebub.description: (76) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 2 days and 16 hours.

Lucifer.Name: Lucifer
Lucifer.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Lucifer.description: (77) You retain optimal cookie production while the game is closed for twice as long, for a total of 5 days and 8 hours.

Golden cookie alert sound.Name: Golden cookie alert sound
Golden cookie alert sound.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Golden cookie alert sound.description: Unlocks the golden cookie sound selector, which lets you pick whether golden cookies emit a sound when appearing or not.

Basic wallpaper assortment.Name: Basic wallpaper assortment
Basic wallpaper assortment.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Basic wallpaper assortment.description: Unlocks the background selector, letting you select the game's background.

Legacy.Name: Legacy
Legacy.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Legacy.description: This is the first heavenly upgrade; it unlocks the Heavenly chips system.

Elder spice.Name: Elder spice
Elder spice.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Residual luck.Name: Residual luck
Residual luck.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Residual luck.description: While the golden switch is on, you gain an additional +10% CpS per golden cookie upgrade owned.

Five-finger discount.Name: Five-finger discount
Five-finger discount.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Five-finger discount.description: All upgrades are 1% cheaper per 100 cursors.

Synergies Vol. I.Name: Synergies Vol. I
Synergies Vol. I.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Synergies Vol. I.description: Unlocks a new tier of upgrades that affect 2 buildings at the same time.

Synergies Vol. II.Name: Synergies Vol. II
Synergies Vol. II.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Synergies Vol. II.description: Unlocks a new tier of upgrades that affect 2 buildings at the same time.

Heavenly cookies.Name: Heavenly cookies
Heavenly cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Wrinkly cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Distilled essence of redoubled luck.description: Golden Cookies have a 1% chance of being doubled.

Stevia Caelestis.Name: Stevia Caelestis
Stevia Caelestis.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Stevia Caelestis.description: Sugar lumps ripen an hour sooner.

Diabetica Daemonicus.Name: Diabetica Daemonicus
Diabetica Daemonicus.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Diabetica Daemonicus.description: Sugar lumps mature an hour sooner.

Sucralosia Inutilis.Name: Sucralosia Inutilis
Sucralosia Inutilis.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Sucralosia Inutilis.description: Bifurcated sugar lumps appear 5% more often and are 5% more likely to drop 2 lumps.

Lucky Digit.Name: Lucky Digit
Lucky Digit.unlock condition: "Heavenly luck" purchased, current prestige level contains at least one instance of "7"
Lucky Digit.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Lucky Number.Name: Lucky Number
Lucky Number.unlock condition: "Lucky Digit" and "Lasting fortune" purchased, current prestige level contains at least two instances of "7"
Lucky Number.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Lucky Payout.Name: Lucky Payout
Lucky Payout.unlock condition: "Lucky Number" and "Decisive fate" purchased, current prestige level contains at least four instances of "7"
Lucky Payout.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Sugar baking.Name: Sugar baking
Sugar baking.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Sugar baking.description: Each unspent sugar lump (up to 100) gives +1% CpS.

Sugar craving.Name: Sugar craving
Sugar craving.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Sugar craving.description: Once an ascension, you may use the "Sugar frenzy" switch to triple your CpS for 1 hour, at the cost of 1 sugar lump.

Sugar aging process.Name: Sugar aging process
Sugar aging process.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Sugar aging process.description: Each grandma (up to 600) makes sugar lumps ripen 6 seconds sooner.

Eye of the wrinkler.Name: Eye of the wrinkler
Eye of the wrinkler.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Eye of the wrinkler.description: Mouse over a wrinkler to see how many cookies are in its stomach. Hangin' tough, stayin' hungry."

Inspired checklist.Name: Inspired checklist
Inspired checklist.unlock condition: "Persistent memory" and "Permanent upgrade slot II" purchased
Inspired checklist.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Inspired checklist.description: Unlocks the Buy all feature, which lets you instantly purchase every upgrade in your store (starting from the cheapest one).

Label printer.Name: Label printer
Label printer.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Label printer.description: Mouse over an upgrade to see its tier.

Heralds.Name: Heralds
Heralds.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Heralds.description: You now benefit from the boost provided by heralds.

Keepsakes.Name: Keepsakes
Keepsakes.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Keepsakes.description: Seasonal random drops have a 1/5 chance to carry over through ascensions.

Sugar crystal cookies.Name: Sugar crystal cookies
Sugar crystal cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Sugar crystal cookies.description: Cookie production multiplier +5% permanently, and +1% for every building level 10 or higher.

Box of maybe cookies.Name: Box of maybe cookies
Box of maybe cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Box of not cookies.Name: Box of not cookies
Box of not cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Box of pastries.Name: Box of pastries
Box of pastries.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Box of pastries.description: Contains an assortment of delicious pastries.

Genius accounting.Name: Genius accounting
Genius accounting.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text

Shimmering veil.Name: Shimmering veil
Shimmering veil.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Shimmering veil.description: Unlocks the shimmering veil, a switch that passively boosts your CpS by 50%.

Cosmic beginner's luck.Name: Cosmic beginner's luck
Cosmic beginner's luck.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Cosmic beginner's luck.description: Prior to purchasing the Heavenly chip secret upgrade in a run, random drops are 5 times more common. Oh! Another penny!"

Reinforced membrane.Name: Reinforced membrane
Reinforced membrane.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Reinforced membrane.description: The shimmering veil is more resistant, and has a 10% chance not to break. It also gives +10% more CPS.

Fortune cookies.Name: Fortune cookies
Fortune cookies.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Fortune cookies.description: The news ticker may occasionally have fortunes, which may be clicked for something good.

Kitten wages.Name: Kitten wages
Kitten wages.source: Cookie Clicker Wiki Ascension pasted text
Kitten wages.description: Through clever accounting, this actually makes kitten upgrades 10% cheaper. Cats are expert hagglers and have a keen sense of bargaining, especially in the case of cash."

Pet the dragon.Name: Pet the dragon
Pet the dragon.unlock condition: "How to bake your dragon" and "Residual luck" purchased

Pet the dragon.description: Unlocks the ability to pet your dragon by clicking on it once hatched.

Cat ladies.Name: Cat ladies
